title: Flow 5 Litre Isopropyl Alcohol IPA | Lab Grade 99.9% Rubbing Alcohol | Disinfectant Household Cleaning Alcohol | Suitable for Electronics, Glass, De-icer, Paint | 1001 Uses (5 Litre)
features: LAB GRADE 99.9% PURE: Isopropyl alcohol commonly referred to as IPA , is a flammable, clear, colourless liquid with a slight alcoholic odour.
SOLVENCY PROPERTIES: It possesses physical, chemical and solvency properties similar to those of ethyl alcohol, making it completely miscible with water and soluble in most organic solvents.
1001 DIFFERENT USES: Isopropyl Alcohol is a highly versatile solvent which has 1001 uses. Suitable for Electronics, Glass, or Removing Paint, Grease and Glue.
MULTIPURPOSE CLEANING SOLUTION: Second only to water it is the most used liquid for cleaning and is found in millions of products worldwide.
GREAT VALUE: Our great value packs come in either 5 Litre,10 Litre or 20 Litre Bundles.
description: Isopropyl alcohol, commonly referred to as IPA , is a flammable, clear, colourless liquid with a slight alcoholic odour. It possesses physical, chemical and solvency properties similar to those of ethyl alcohol, making it completely miscible with water and soluble in most organic solvents. Isopropyl Alcohol is a highly versatile solvent which has 1001 uses. Second only to water it is the most used liquid for cleaning and is found in millions of products worldwide.
